faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know
faq.q1_q: What does the free analysis include?
faq.q1_a: The free analysis provides a basic SEO score, performance metrics (LCP, CLS), DNS check, and a few critical recommendations. It can only be used once per domain.
faq.q2_q: When will my paid report be delivered?
faq.q2_a: Once payment is confirmed, analysis starts automatically. After scanning 20+ metrics, your report is sent to your email within 5-10 minutes.
faq.q3_a: Payments are processed via Stripe and PayPal infrastructure. Your card details are never stored on GeoSerra servers.
faq.q4_q: Are my access credentials safe with the implementation service?
faq.q4_a: Your cPanel or SSH credentials are used only during the task and are not saved to our database. We recommend changing your password after the task is complete.
faq.q5_a: Visibility and citability analysis is performed for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT web search, Perplexity AI, and Bing Copilot.
faq.q6_a: When the report is ready it is sent to your email as a PDF. You can also track its status at /report/[id] and download the PDF directly from there.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: GeoSerra is a GEO SEO analysis platform built to help websites become more visible in AI-powered search engines.
about.ai_desc: Custom analysis metrics for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT and Perplexity
about.mission_desc: Make AI search visibility accessible to businesses of all sizes
about.vision_desc: Our vision is to combine classic SEO metrics with AI citability and visibility signals in one clear decision surface.
about.speed_desc: Analysis in 2 minutes, PDF report in 10 minutes
about.body: GeoSerra was built by a team that noticed SEO is changing with AI. Traditional SEO tools do not adequately cover platforms like Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT web search and Perplexity. We are here to close that gap.
about.v1_desc: We explain how every metric is calculated. No black-box scores — every point is backed by a concrete check.
about.v2_desc: Our recommendations are based on real crawler data, Lighthouse metrics, and schema validation results. Measurement, not guesswork.
about.v3_desc: Making AI visibility tools — previously only available to large agencies — accessible to SMBs and freelancers is our core goal.
about.v4_desc: Our reports don't just show data — they deliver concrete, prioritized steps. Reports you actually act on.
about.story2: As of 2025, approximately 30% of Google searches begin with AI Overviews. ChatGPT, Perplexity and Bing Copilot serve millions of users with answers compiled from web pages. In this landscape, simply 'ranking' is no longer enough — AI systems must be able to cite that content.
about.story3: This is exactly where GeoSerra steps in: we combine your site's technical health (Lighthouse, Core Web Vitals), structured data quality (JSON-LD schema), brand authority signals (sameAs, social presence) and AI citability score into a single report. For each category we provide concrete, prioritized action items.
about.tech1: GeoSerra's analysis engine is built on Python-based scripts. Each analysis category is an independent module: lighthouse_checker.py, dns_checker.py, brand_scanner.py, citability_scorer.py. This modular structure lets us develop and test each category independently.
about.tech2: On the backend we use Fastify 5 and the Bun runtime. Bun's fast startup time and Fastify's low overhead keep API response times under 50 ms. At the database layer we chose MySQL 8 and Drizzle ORM for type-safe queries.
about.tech3: For paid analyses, a Llama 4 model running on Groq is activated. This model generates human-readable, contextual recommendations from raw metrics. The AI layer is disabled for free analyses — so API costs are not passed on to users.
about.founder_bio1: Full-stack developer with over five years of experience in Next.js, Fastify, and AI integration, Orhan has shipped 20+ projects in web performance and search visibility.
about.founder_bio2: He built GeoSerra while searching for an answer to his own clients' question: 'Why doesn't ChatGPT see us?' Noticing that existing tools did not adequately address AI citability, he decided to build the platform from scratch.
about.measures_desc: Our analysis is built on six main categories. Each category is scored independently, and their weighted total forms your overall GEO score.
about.m1_desc: Citability in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Bing Copilot
about.m2_desc: sameAs links, social presence, Wikipedia, backlink profile
about.m3_desc: Content depth, author expertise, trustworthiness signals
about.m4_desc: TTFB, Core Web Vitals (LCP/CLS/INP), SSR quality
about.m5_desc: JSON-LD schema accuracy, FAQPage, Product, Organization
about.cta_desc: 1 free analysis per domain. No credit card required. Results in 2 minutes.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_text: GeoSerra processes the URL, email address, payment transaction references, and generated analysis results during an analysis request. If an account is created, name, email, and hashed authentication data are stored.
privacy.s2_text: Collected data is used to deliver free or paid GEO SEO analysis, generate PDF reports, manage accounts, handle support processes, and improve service quality. Data is never shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s3_text: Data is protected via access controls, server security, and third-party payment infrastructure (Stripe, PayPal). Card data is never stored directly on GeoSerra servers. All connections are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS.
privacy.s4_text: Users have the right to access, correct, delete, and object to the processing of their personal data. These requests can be handled through our support channel.
privacy.s5_text: GeoSerra uses minimal cookies for session management and analytics. No third-party advertising cookies are used. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.s6_text: For all privacy-related requests, please reach us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_text: GeoSerra provides GEO, SEO, performance and AI visibility analysis reports for websites. Reports and recommendations are for informational purposes; implementation decisions rest entirely with the user.
terms.s2_text: The free analysis feature can be used once per domain. When the system detects abuse (e.g. multiple domain trials, bot traffic), it may reject new free analysis requests.
terms.s3_text: Paid reports are processed after payment confirmation. Due to the digital nature of the service, refund requests after report generation are evaluated case by case. Full refunds are provided for issues caused by technical failures.
terms.s4_text: GeoSerra reports contain recommendations and prioritization. Third-party platform algorithms (Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.) may change over time. GeoSerra does not guarantee results on those platforms.
terms.s5_text: Users are responsible for the security of their own account. GeoSerra is not liable for damages resulting from sharing your password with third parties.
terms.s6_text: GeoSerra may update these terms without prior notice. Current terms are published on this page. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

report_preview_issues.i1_text: llms.txt not found — AI crawlers cannot access content
report_preview_issues.i2_text: Organization schema sameAs array missing — brand authority low
report_preview_issues.i3_text: FAQPage JSON-LD missing — AI systems cannot find Q&A format
report_preview_issues.i4_text: Canonical URL not defined — duplicate content risk present

analyze_info.measures_desc: GeoSerra evaluates your site across six independent categories to produce a single GEO score. Each category represents a different AI or search signal.
analyze_info.cat1_desc: Checks whether ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and Bing Copilot can cite your site, and verifies llms.txt and robots.txt access rules.
analyze_info.cat2_desc: Analyzes sameAs links, social media presence, Wikipedia references, and backlink profile — core signals for brand credibility.
analyze_info.cat3_desc: Evaluates content depth, author expertise (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) and trustworthiness signals.
analyze_info.cat4_desc: Measures TTFB, Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP), server-side render quality and page speed metrics with Lighthouse.
analyze_info.cat5_desc: Validates JSON-LD schema accuracy and checks for FAQPage, Product, Organization, Person and BreadcrumbList markup.
analyze_info.cat6_desc: Inspects robots.txt, sitemap.xml, canonical URL, hreflang configuration, HSTS and security headers.
analyze_info.step1_desc: Enter the full address of the website you want to analyze. A complete URL starting with https:// is required. Free analysis allows one use per domain.
analyze_info.step2_desc: The system runs Lighthouse testing, schema validation, DNS/SSL checks, brand signal scanning, and AI crawler access controls in parallel. Average time is 30–60 seconds.
analyze_info.step3_desc: Raw data from six categories is combined using a weighted formula. Each category scores its own sub-metrics from 0–100; the overall GEO score is their weighted average.
analyze_info.step4_desc: The free report shows the overall GEO score, Lighthouse performance score and the 5 most critical issues. Paid reports include all categories, per-category action lists and a downloadable PDF.
analyze_info.score_desc: The GEO score is a number between 0 and 100. The industry average hovers around 45–55. Evaluate your site's position using the table below:
analyze_info.score_critical_desc: AI systems are most likely not seeing this site. Fundamental technical issues present.
analyze_info.score_below_desc: Some categories are fine, but AI visibility is insufficient. High improvement potential.
analyze_info.score_avg_desc: Basic GEO signals are present. More is needed to stand out among competitors.
analyze_info.score_good_desc: AI systems are likely finding and citing this site. Opportunities to stand out further.
analyze_info.score_excellent_desc: Top segment in the industry. Strong authority signal in AI and search visibility.
analyze_info.faq1_q: What is the difference between free and paid analysis?
analyze_info.faq1_a: The free analysis shows the overall GEO score, Lighthouse performance score and the 5 most critical issues. The paid report includes AI Citability, Schema, E-E-A-T and Brand Authority details, a prioritized action plan, and a downloadable PDF.
analyze_info.faq2_q: How many seconds does the analysis take?
analyze_info.faq2_a: 30–60 seconds is sufficient for most sites. Slow-loading sites or complex technical structures may take up to 90 seconds.
analyze_info.faq3_a: The GEO score is a point-in-time measurement. Since SEO and GEO variables change rapidly, re-analysis is recommended whenever the site undergoes significant changes.
analyze_info.faq4_q: Can I analyze a competitor's site?
analyze_info.faq4_a: Yes. You can enter any public URL. Competitor analysis lets you benchmark against your own site.

contact_info.c1_desc: Responded within 24 hours on business days. Urgent technical issues: 4-hour SLA.
contact_info.c2_desc: Write to us for GEO/SEO report content, metric explanations and recommendation details.
contact_info.c3_desc: Agency partnerships, white-label reports and bulk license discussions.
contact_info.c4_desc: Direct support for payment, access and report delivery issues.

impl_info.what_desc: You have your GeoSerra report and a recommendation list — but no time or expertise to handle the technical implementation. That's where we come in. You share your cPanel or VPS access, and we apply the technical GEO/SEO actions from your report directly on your server.
impl_info.service1: Create / fix robots.txt and llms.txt files
impl_info.service2: Add JSON-LD schema markup (FAQPage, Product, Organization)
impl_info.service5: Generate sitemap.xml and submit to Google Search Console
impl_info.service6: Open Graph and meta tag optimization
impl_info.service7: Page speed optimization (gzip, cache-control, image format)
impl_info.service8: Favicon and PWA icon set generation
impl_info.step1_desc: Fill in the form. Provide your GeoSerra report or domain address. Enter your cPanel / SSH credentials via the secure form.
impl_info.step2_desc: We review your site and report together. We send you an email listing the changes to be made for your approval.
impl_info.step3_desc: After approval we apply the actions on your server. A backup is taken before all changes.
impl_info.step4_desc: A delivery report with the list of changes and before/after screenshots is sent to you by email.
impl_info.sec1: Access credentials are deleted after the task
impl_info.sec3: A backup is taken before all changes
impl_info.sec4: We recommend changing your password after the task
